case_title: HATTER, SAID DBA INTERNATIONAL MOTORS VS PALMA, EDSEL B et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HATTER, SAID DBA INTERNATIONAL MOTORS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALMA, EDSEL B PALMA, CYNTHIA $245.00 PRINCIPAL, $49.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $294.00, DEFT EDSEL PALMA STATED THAT HE IS WAIVING SERVICE OF PROCESS AS TO HIS SPOUSE, CYNTHIA PALMA, AND IS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
